title: theme — subprocessors used
description: Third-party subprocessors this module uses for its own operation.

subprocessors.name: Puppeteer / Chromium (managed via chrome-php or laravel/browsershot)
subprocessors.purpose: Headless browser used by PreviewPresetJob to render the canonical preview template with a preset's tokens applied → screenshot → uploaded as ThemePreset.preview_thumbnail_url.
subprocessors.hosting: in-cluster (workers run Chromium in a sidecar container / dedicated node pool)
subprocessors.data_shared: Only the preset's own tokens jsonb + the canonical preview HTML template. NO tenant PII, NO customer data.
subprocessors.compliance: No GDPR sub-processor addendum required — no personal data leaves the workload boundary.
subprocessors.fallback_when_unavailable: preview_thumbnail_url stays NULL; admin UI renders a color-swatch placeholder derived from the preset's color.primary.500 + color.surface.default tokens.
